text: Just the second punt of the day for Philadelphia. Here's Sippas. Low sinking kick. Tony on the run. Still up on his feet. Tony has a wall. It's another block. Tony inside the twenty. Tony still going, and he's down to the five. Low line drive punt by Aaron Sippas, the punter, back from that injury. Kadarius Tony starts to his left, and the entire wall was built to his right side. He's able to get to it and has Kansas City set up for a big possession here down inside the ten.
